parsed_review.summary: CP00-192 is a Risk A, 10-unit descriptor-only failure-fixture-entry boundary pack for RP05 Matter Core (RP05.P07.M05.S21-RP05.P07.M06.S08). Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the production posture is supported and not overclaimed: the pack declares production_ready=false / status in_progress and explicitly disclaims enterprise trust and Claude final approval. Implementation is internally consistent and fail-closed: registry.js defines the pack binding and a 30+ flag no-write attestation (all false, synthetic_only/no_real_client_data true) plus the failure-fixture-entry requirements; service.js builds the 10 rows purely from control names with every leak/runtime flag false and inert replay commands, and freezeFailureFixtureEntryBoundaryResult re-stamps all no-write flags on every result; validators.js validateMatterCoreCp192FailureFixtureEntryBoundary enforces row/outcome/ref/customer-safe-code/leak-guard invariants and requires permission_denied and cross_tenant rows to be blocked, claude_edge_case_prompt review_required, and human_escalation_note approval_required; the contract failure_fixture_entry_boundary section and current_pack mirror the registry exactly. Coverage matches the baseline (2 tail + 8 fixture rows; deliverable distribution claude_review:1/implementation:1/failure_recovery:7/security_audit:1). Tests (model.test.js CP00-192 cases and validate-rp05-matter-core-contract.mjs) assert coverage.valid, boundary.valid, leak guards true, hermes production_ready_candidate true, and the Claude packet read_only with tools [Read,Grep,Glob] handing off to CP00-193. Authority boundary holds: Claude is a read-only independent reviewer (not final approver) and the Hermes H05 packet is a deterministic, frozen review/evidence descriptor with no product-runtime, Loop, graph, or citation-ledger execution. CP178+ review hardening is correctly applied: the 0-byte/PENDING placeholder in claude-review-result.json is honestly recorded as exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run=false with empty valid_review_receipts and is NOT counted as valid review evidence; auth preflight passed. Changed-file scope is clean (7 active implementation refs match; unrelated dirty/untracked files correctly classified and excluded). No P0/P1/P2 issues. Two P3 informational notes: (1) only focused matter-core commands are evidenced (construction-inspection all_passed=false, Hermes gate pending_final_validation) so the full 11-command validation suite must still pass before commit; (2) the single valid pack-level hardened Claude review receipt is still pending and is supplied by this review. These are by-design pre-closeout states, not defects; final pack/goal closeout remains gated on the full validation suite plus human final approval, which this review does not grant.

findings.title: Full closeout validation suite not yet evidenced (focused matter-core checks only)
findings.details: command-evidence.json captures only focused matter-core checks (node --check x5, node --test, npm run rp05:matter-core:validate, all exit 0) and construction-inspection.json reports tests_and_validation.all_passed=false with hermes_gate status 'pending_final_validation'. The review baseline lists 11 required validation_commands (npm run closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, rp05:matter-core:validate, npm test, npm run validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) whose passing results are not yet present in evidence. This is consistent with the pack's honest in_progress/pending_final_validation posture and is not a misrepresentation, but it is a real gate for closeout. As a read-only reviewer I cannot execute these commands.
findings.recommendation: Run and capture passing results for the full 11-command validation suite (including npm test, npm run validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, and git diff --check) before committing/closing CP00-192; flip construction-inspection all_passed and the Hermes gate only on green.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational/non-blocking; tracked as a final-validation prerequisite to be satisfied before commit and human approval.

findings.title: Pack-level hardened Claude review receipt pending; placeholder correctly not counted valid
findings.details: manifest.pack_level_claude_review.status is 'pending_hardened_review' with review_receipt_ref null, and claude-review-result.json records exactly_one_valid_pack_level_claude_review_run=false, valid_review_receipts=[], invalid_review_attempts=[], with a 0-byte/PENDING raw_output. This is the expected pre-review state and the hardening logic is correctly rejecting the empty placeholder rather than treating it as a valid review. This independent review supplies the required review evidence.
findings.recommendation: Persist exactly one valid hardened review receipt from this run (non-zero stdout, schema-valid JSON, no auth failure / fenced-prose / tool-call-shaped output) and ensure the empty placeholder is never promoted to valid_review_receipts; keep human final approval as the gate for any enterprise trust claim.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational/non-blocking; confirms hardening behavior. This review's structured output is the intended valid receipt content.
